title: RacesPlugin
description: This is a plugin for Minecraft that adds races
body:
---

**Races** is an RPG plugin for Minecraft that adds a race system and changes gameplay depending on the selected race. Each player can choose one of four unique races through a convenient menu (`/race`) and receive special abilities, bonuses, and weaknesses.

---

**⚔ Available Races:**

🌿 **Elf** — a fast and precise forest archer. Receives a powerful bow (Power V, Unbreaking), increased movement speed, bonus bow damage, forest regeneration, and reduced fall damage. However, has lower health and reduced effectiveness in melee combat.

⛏ **Dwarf** — a tough underground warrior and master miner. Receives an unbreakable diamond pickaxe (Efficiency V), increased defense, bonus melee damage, poison immunity, and night vision underground. Moves slower and is less effective with ranged attacks.

🔥 **Dragonborn** — a descendant of dragons with elemental powers. Receives a random element (fire, ice, or lightning) and can activate Elemental Breath with a right-click. Has increased physical damage and permanent Resistance I, but moves slower and is vulnerable to the opposite element.

🌑 **Shadow Entity** — a master of darkness and teleportation. Becomes invisible in dark areas, deals increased damage at night, and the Shadow Dash ability allows instant forward teleportation. Weak in daylight — receives penalties and takes damage from the sun.


others are in the changelog...
---

**⚙ Plugin Features:**

* All settings (bonuses, cooldowns, damage) can be flexibly adjusted in `config.yml` without recompilation
* Supports two languages: **English** and **Ukrainian** — switchable in the config
* Fully customizable plugin name in chat — you can set your own server name
* All changes can be applied with `/race reload` without restarting the server
* Player data is saved between sessions

---

**📋 Commands:**

| Command               | Description                      |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| `/race`               | Open the race selection menu     |
| `/race info`          | View information about your race |
| `/race choose <race>` | Choose a race without GUI        |
| `/race reload`        | Reload the configuration (admin) |
| `/race reset`         | Reset a player's race (admin)    |

---
